label: cheque
text: A customer gave me a cheque of Rs 1,20,000 for goods supplied to his shop. The bank returned it saying insufficient funds. He keeps promising to pay next week but nothing comes.

label: cheque
text: I lent my colleague Rs 50,000 and he repaid me with a post dated cheque. When I deposited it on the date, it bounced with the remark funds insufficient. He is now avoiding me at office.

label: cheque
text: The cheque my business partner gave me for my share of profits, Rs 3.5 lakhs, was dishonoured twice. His bank says the signature does not match. I believe he did this deliberately.

label: cheque
text: My tenant paid two months rent with a cheque that bounced. He has also not paid the following month. The cheque was for Rs 36,000. What is the process to recover this?

label: cheque
text: I sold my old Activa to a neighbour for Rs 42,000. He took the scooter and gave a cheque which came back unpaid, account closed. He says he will pay in cash slowly, monthly.

label: cheque
text: Maine apne dost ko 2 lakh udhaar diye the shaadi ke liye. Usne cheque diya tha wapas karne ke liye, wo bounce ho gaya. Ab wo phone nahi uthata. Notice bhejna padega kya?

label: cheque
text: Our landlord returned our security deposit with a cheque of Rs 80,000 when we vacated. It bounced with stop payment marked. He says we damaged the flat, which is untrue, and refuses to pay now.

label: cheque
text: A builder repaid my cancelled booking amount with three post dated cheques. The first one for Rs 2 lakhs has bounced. The remaining two are dated next month and I doubt they will clear.

label: cheque
text: I supplied vegetables to a hotel on credit for six months. Their settlement cheque of Rs 1.8 lakhs was dishonoured. The manager says the owner is abroad and to wait indefinitely.

label: cheque
text: My brother in law took Rs 5 lakhs from me for his business and gave a signed cheque as security. He has stopped repaying. If I deposit the cheque and it bounces, what can I do legally?

label: cheque
text: The company I worked for gave me my final settlement cheque of Rs 94,000 after I resigned. It bounced due to insufficient funds and HR has stopped responding to my emails.

label: cheque
text: I received a cheque of Rs 65,000 from a client for a website project. It was returned unpaid. I sent a legal notice fifteen days ago and he has neither replied nor paid.

label: cheque
text: A chit fund organiser in our locality gave members cheques when the fund matured. Mine for Rs 1 lakh bounced, and I know at least four others whose cheques also bounced.

label: cheque
text: My customer's cheque for Rs 30,000 bounced in March. I sent the demand notice within the time limit but he has now sent a reply through a lawyer claiming the cheque was stolen from him.

label: cheque
text: The buyer of my agricultural land paid part of the price by cheque, Rs 7 lakhs. It was dishonoured. Registration is already done in his name. I feel cheated and do not know the next step.

label: cheque
text: I gave my shop's old furniture and equipment to another shopkeeper for Rs 55,000. His cheque bounced twice. The bank memo says payment stopped by drawer. He is openly refusing to pay now.

label: cheque
text: Meri kirana dukaan hai. Ek regular customer ne mahine bhar ka udhaar chukane ke liye 48,000 ka cheque diya. Bank ne lauta diya, account me paise nahi the. Wo ab dukaan pe aana band ho gaya hai.

label: cheque
text: A transporter owed my firm freight charges and settled with a cheque of Rs 2.2 lakhs. It bounced. Within what time do I have to send the notice? The memo is dated the 3rd of this month.

label: cheque
text: My employer has been paying salary by cheque for the last year. The cheques for the last two months, Rs 38,000 each, both bounced. He says the company account has a temporary freeze and to be patient.

label: cheque
text: I am a milk supplier. The sweet shop I supply to gave a cheque for the quarterly bill of Rs 74,000 which was dishonoured for insufficient funds. He wants to adjust it against future supply instead of paying.

label: cheque
text: My sister's ex husband was directed to pay maintenance and gave six post dated cheques. The second one bounced. Is a cheque bounce case possible in addition to the family court matter?

label: cheque
text: A distributor collected Rs 4 lakhs from me as franchise deposit and when the deal fell through he refunded by cheque. It bounced with the remark refer to drawer. He has now switched off his phone.

label: cheque
text: The contractor who built my house compound wall took an advance but abandoned the work, and returned the advance with a cheque of Rs 90,000 after panchayat mediation. That cheque has now bounced.

label: cheque
text: I discounted a cheque for an acquaintance, giving him cash against his customer's cheque of Rs 1.5 lakhs. The cheque bounced and both of them are blaming each other. The cheque is in my name.

label: cheque
text: My tuition centre received a cheque of Rs 24,000 from a parent for the annual fee. It bounced twice. The parent says fees are disputed because his child left after two months, but he signed the annual contract.

label: cheque
text: A scrap dealer purchased machinery from my closed workshop and paid with a cheque of Rs 3 lakhs which was dishonoured, account closed. He has resold the machinery already.

label: cheque
text: I received a legal notice saying my cheque of Rs 2 lakhs bounced, but I had given that cheque as blank security for a loan I already repaid in cash. The lender filled the amount and deposited it.

label: cheque
text: The society collected repair fund contributions and the treasurer's refund cheque to me for excess collection, Rs 18,000, bounced. Committee says deposit it again next month, third time now.

label: cheque
text: Humne apni gaadi bechi thi 5.5 lakh me. Aadha cash mila, aadhe ka cheque diya tha buyer ne. Cheque do baar bounce ho chuka hai. Gaadi bhi le gaya, paise bhi nahi de raha. Bahut pareshan hoon.

label: cheque
text: My friend's wife took gold jewellery from my mother to pawn for an emergency and gave a cheque of Rs 2.6 lakhs as assurance. The jewellery is not returned and the cheque has bounced.

label: cheque
text: I run a printing press. A political party worker got election banners printed worth Rs 88,000 and paid by cheque which bounced. Now elections are over and he says the party will pay someday.

label: cheque
text: The insurance surveyor settled my claim partly in cash and the balance through the garage owner who gave me his cheque of Rs 40,000. That cheque bounced. The garage owner says the insurer has not released his money.

label: cheque
text: I have received a court summons in a cheque bounce case. The cheque was from my closed proprietorship account and was given as security to a supplier whose bills I dispute. I never intended it as payment.

label: cheque
text: A caterer friend borrowed my banquet crockery and equipment for a season, then bought them outright for Rs 1.1 lakhs by cheque. It bounced with insufficient funds and he keeps postponing.

label: cheque
text: My father supplied bricks to a contractor for years. The last outstanding was settled with two cheques of Rs 1 lakh each. Both bounced on the same day. The contractor's site is now shut.

label: cheque
text: An educational trust hired our bus service for a year. Their cheque for the final quarter, Rs 1.35 lakhs, bounced and the trustee says sign a fresh contract with a discount if you want the old dues.

label: cheque
text: I gave a personal loan of Rs 80,000 to my domestic help's husband against a cheque. It bounced, account dormant. They still work in our building and admit the debt but simply do not pay.

label: cheque
text: The pharmacy attached to a private hospital returned my excess advance of Rs 52,000 by cheque at discharge. It bounced a week later and the accounts desk says the file has gone for reprocessing.

label: cheque
text: My export firm received a domestic buyer's cheque of Rs 6 lakhs against delivered garments. It was dishonoured for signature mismatch, and the buyer refuses to issue a fresh cheque or pay online.

label: cheque
text: A wedding hall we run received a booking balance cheque of Rs 1.9 lakhs which bounced after the event was over. The customer's phone is switched off and the address on the contract is a rented house he left.

label: cheque
text: I paid the full amount for a used tractor and the seller was supposed to clear the pending loan on it. He gave the finance company a cheque that bounced, and now they threaten to seize the tractor from me.

label: cheque
text: Bhai ne business ke liye 3 lakh liye the, stamp paper pe likha ke aur cheque de ke. Cheque bounce ho gaya, ab bolta hai ghar ka mamla hai court mat jao. Mujhe paise wapas chahiye bas.

label: cheque
text: Our kirana wholesale firm holds a bounced cheque of Rs 2.4 lakhs from a retailer. The notice period passed with no payment. He has offered Rs 1 lakh as full and final. Should we accept or file the case?

label: cheque
text: The interior contractor gave my wife a refund cheque for cancelled work. It bounced with the remark drawer's signature differs. He claims his accountant signed it wrongly by mistake and wants three more months.

label: cheque
text: I supplied packing material to a factory for eight months. Their cheque of Rs 5.2 lakhs bounced and the director says the company is going into insolvency, so I should file my claim there and forget the cheque.

label: cheque
text: A neighbour took my car for Rs 2.75 lakhs, paid Rs 75,000 and gave a cheque for the rest. It has bounced three times over four months. The RC transfer is pending and he is using the car daily.

label: cheque
text: My mother's tenant runs a beauty parlour in our shop space. Her rent cheques for three consecutive months bounced, total Rs 66,000. She says business is slow and continues to occupy the shop.

label: cheque
text: The travel operator who cancelled our group tour refunded everyone except us. Our refund cheque of Rs 96,000 bounced. Other families were paid online. He says our booking had a special discount so we must wait.

label: cheque
text: I am a retired teacher. A former colleague borrowed Rs 4 lakhs from my retirement fund promising interest, and gave post dated cheques. The first two bounced. My family does not know about the loan yet.

label: cheque
text: Our firm received a cheque of Rs 12 lakhs from a dealer against outstanding invoices. It bounced for insufficient funds. He admits liability on WhatsApp but wants us to take post dated cheques again.

label: cheque
text: A jeweller friend took old gold from me to remake ornaments and later chose to buy it, giving a cheque of Rs 3.3 lakhs. The cheque bounced and he now claims the gold weighed less than agreed.

label: cheque
text: A finance agent I once borrowed from has deposited an old blank cheque of mine with an inflated amount of Rs 4.5 lakhs written in different ink. It bounced and he sent me a notice. I repaid that loan years ago.

label: cheque
text: The buyer of my flat gave a cheque of Rs 10 lakhs towards the down payment after signing the agreement to sell. It bounced. He wants the agreement extended without any penalty.

label: cheque
text: I do embroidery job work from home. A boutique owner settled six months of my bills with a cheque of Rs 62,000. It came back unpaid. She has now blocked me but her boutique runs as usual.

label: cheque
text: My transport union collected accident contribution from members and the union treasurer's cheque to the victim's family, Rs 2 lakhs, bounced. The family has asked me, as president, what to do legally.

label: cheque
text: A relative took my fixed deposit money for his hospital construction promising to return it with a bank cheque. The cheque of Rs 8 lakhs was dishonoured, and he says the CA misplaced funds temporarily.

label: cheque
text: Dukaan ke liye maal liya tha ek party se, unka hisaab clear karne ko cheque diya tha maine. Galti se account me paise kam the aur cheque bounce ho gaya. Ab unhone notice bhej diya hai. Mujhe kya karna chahiye?

label: cheque
text: The gym franchise owner returned my franchise security deposit with a cheque of Rs 5 lakhs when the brand terminated his rights. It bounced, and the brand says the deposit was with him, not them.

label: cheque
text: I received two cheques from a debtor, one cleared and the second of Rs 1.2 lakhs bounced. He says the cleared one covers the principal and the bounced one was only interest which he never agreed to.

label: cheque
text: Our school's fee refund cheque to me for double payment, Rs 34,000, bounced twice. The accountant says the trust signatory changed and all old cheques are invalid, but they do not issue a new one.

label: cheque
text: A property dealer brokered my plot sale and the buyer's part payment cheque of Rs 9 lakhs bounced after possession was given. The dealer now avoids responsibility saying he only introduced the parties.

label: cheque
text: My poultry feed supplier business received a cheque of Rs 2.9 lakhs from a farm owner. Bounced, insufficient funds. His farm is on leased land and I worry he has no assets even if I win a case.

label: cheque
text: The event company that hired my sound system for the season gave a consolidated cheque of Rs 1.45 lakhs. It bounced and the proprietor has started a new company under his wife's name doing the same events.

label: cheque
text: I gave a hand loan of Rs 60,000 to my neighbour for his daughter's admission against a post dated cheque. He requested me twice to delay depositing. When I finally deposited it, the account was closed.

label: cheque
text: A garment shop cleared my tailoring unit's dues with a cheque of Rs 78,000 that bounced. The owner's son says his father has dementia and the son is not responsible for the shop's old payments.

label: cheque
text: My cheque to a supplier bounced because my company account was frozen by the bank over a KYC issue the same week. The supplier has sent a Section 138 notice. I have the bank's letter about the freeze.

label: cheque
text: The dairy cooperative settled my cattle feed bills with a cheque of Rs 1.05 lakhs. It was returned with the remark exceeds arrangement. The secretary says the new committee will decide on old payments.

label: cheque
text: A friend and I jointly funded a food truck. When we split, he bought my share and gave three cheques. The first cleared, the second of Rs 1.6 lakhs bounced, and he postdated the third by a full year without asking.

label: cheque
text: I financed my nephew's shop stock of Rs 2.5 lakhs against a cheque. It bounced. Family elders say settle at half. The notice deadline is approaching and I cannot decide whether to file or settle.

label: cheque
text: An advertising client's cheque of Rs 3.15 lakhs to my agency bounced. He immediately paid Rs 50,000 online and promised the rest in weekly instalments, but the instalments stopped after two weeks.

label: cheque
text: The rice mill I supply paddy to gave a cheque for the season's settlement, Rs 4.8 lakhs. It bounced due to stop payment. The mill owner claims moisture deductions justify paying less and stopping the cheque.

label: cheque
text: My car accident compensation was partly paid by the other party privately through a cheque of Rs 1.5 lakhs to avoid police involvement. The cheque bounced and now he denies the accident entirely.

label: cheque
text: A hostel mess contractor owed my vegetable business Rs 83,000 and his cheque bounced. He has moved to another city's college mess. I have his new address from a mutual contact.

label: cheque
text: I took a franchisee's territory back and my company issued his deposit refund, but our accountant issued it from a closed account by mistake and it bounced. He is threatening a case against me personally.

label: cheque
text: The dhaba owner near my petrol pump settled his diesel account with a cheque of Rs 1.28 lakhs which bounced. He offers to pay in kind through free meals for staff, which is useless to me.

label: cheque
text: My husband's friend took Rs 7 lakhs for a joint plot purchase that never happened. He returned Rs 2 lakhs and gave a cheque for the balance which has bounced. The plot was never even registered.

label: cheque
text: A bounced cheque of Rs 45,000 from a customer is with me, but I have crossed almost a month since the bank memo. How many days do I have for the notice, and what happens if I am late?

label: cheque
text: The engineering college placement cell hired our buses and the account cheque of Rs 2.1 lakhs bounced. The college blames the transport committee which has since been dissolved after an audit issue.

label: cheque
text: My wife's boutique customer took bridal wear worth Rs 92,000 on a cheque that bounced after the wedding. Her family says the outfits were defective, though they were worn for the full event and photos exist.

label: cheque
text: I hold a bounced cheque of Rs 15 lakhs from a land deal. The drawer has offered a registered settlement deed for a smaller amount. My lawyer friend says a 138 case is stronger. I want a second opinion.
